lines: Aurelia Priscian lays one applicant form over another until no dependent’s name is hidden.
"I can answer for beds and treatment. I can also assign a condenser monitoring team. I cannot answer for every Compact decision that made this place."

choices.label: Ask what the Compact wants and offers

lines: Aurelia squares the applicant forms against the edge of her case.

choices.label: Tell her what the applicants said

lines: Aurelia folds the full-flow protocol beneath the applicant forms.

choices.label: Ask why she wants the census
Request urgent treatment without the agreement

lines: "I assign monitors and treatment stock if South Measure permits a full exposure census. The undercroft records pass to Compact custody under the same agreement."
"Those are substantial terms. Calling them care does not make them smaller."

choices.label: Request treatment without the full agreement

lines: "I have beds for applicants, not for a settlement. A kinder sentence will not make more beds."
"The admitted list includes Noa’s school place and Timothy’s works test. Damaris’s clinic review excludes her child, as the other offers exclude dependents."
"Exposure histories here span generations. That record could improve suppressant timing and inherited-risk models."
"It could also prove that the Compact kept named obligations open for a century. I understand why Susanna does not hand it over."

choices.label: Ask who would own the record

lines: "The instruments separate ordinary pipe strain from the buried reply. Full flow needs two staff at the condenser and access below the court."
"That allocation requires a care agreement. I can challenge the rule, but I cannot pretend it is not written."
"Yes. Capacity limits become family separation when written onto actual people."
"If I tear up Noa’s form, I have kept her family together by keeping all of them here. That is not mercy either."

choices.label: Let her return to the forms

lines: "Compact custody means controlled access with verified copies. Residents lose any veto over research use."
"Supervised local custody would protect consent better. My office will say it weakens the data."

choices.label: Make no promise about the records

lines: "Thecla can begin urgent treatment without a settlement agreement. I will sign that exception."
"It does not assign the monitoring team. Please do not confuse the smaller promise with a lie."
Aurelia checks Timothy’s form, then Damaris’s dependent sheet.
"They understand the choice, which does not make it freely chosen."
"I can put the pressure into the record, but ink cannot remove it."

choices.label: Leave their motives on the record
